nasb.text: and one third shall be at the king’s house, and a third at the Gate of the Foundation; and all the people shall be in the courts of the house of the Lord.

esv.text: and one third shall be at the king’s house and one third at the Gate of the Foundation. And all the people shall be in the courts of the house of the Lord.

cnv.text: 三分之一要在王宮，三分之一要在基址門；全體人民都要在耶和華殿的院子裡。

ccb.text: 三分之一要把守王宫，三分之一要把守基址门，所有民众要留在耶和华殿的院子里。
